task_params.subject: Possible collaboration for our next wellness workshop
body_points: Invite Maya and Riverfront Yoga Collective to collaborate
Mention the next local wellness workshop
Say I admire their community-centered approach
Suggest combining movement and creative wellness elements
Ask if they would be open to a brief planning call
Keep the tone thoughtful, warm, and professional

arguments.subject: Possible collaboration for our next wellness workshop

attributes.subject: Volunteer recap and ideas for next quarter
attributes.body: Thanks again for helping with the community health fair. We would love to explore more arts-based wellness programming in the coming months.

attributes.subject: Following up on workshop turnout
attributes.body: The nutrition table had a great response. Let me know if you'd like to partner again for another public wellness event.

attributes.subject: Updated supply request process
attributes.body: Please use the revised internal form for nonclinical supply requests starting next week.
